evals.name: fresh-all-tasks
evals.expected_output: 從全新狀態依 TDD 流程處理所有任務：先依序為 T1、T2 呼叫 bdd-unit-test 撰寫 BDD 測試，將任務標記為 [BDD]，等所有一般任務測試都寫完後才開始實作，最後測試通過並將任務標記為 [x][BDD]。

assertions.name: 先為 T1 撰寫 BDD 測試
assertions.check: transcript shows calling bdd-unit-test for T1 before implementing currency.js

assertions.name: 先為 T2 撰寫 BDD 測試
assertions.check: transcript shows calling bdd-unit-test for T2 before implementing index.js

assertions.name: 所有測試完成後才開始實作
assertions.check: transcript shows implementation starts only after all non-manual tasks have been marked [BDD]

assertions.name: T1 最終更新為 [x][BDD]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T1 is changed from [ ] to [BDD] during test-writing and to [x][BDD] after implementation

assertions.name: T2 最終更新為 [x][BDD]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T2 is changed from [ ] to [BDD] during test-writing and to [x][BDD] after implementation

evals.name: resume-partial
evals.expected_output: 接續部分完成狀態時，先辨識已完成或舊版狀態的任務並補齊 BDD 狀態；若 T2 尚未有 [BDD]，必須先為 T2 呼叫 bdd-unit-test 撰寫測試並標記 [BDD]，等待所有一般任務測試都就緒後才實作 T2，最後更新為 [x][BDD]。

assertions.name: T1 舊狀態被辨識並補齊 BDD 狀態
assertions.check: transcript indicates T1 is already implemented or in legacy [x] state and verifies or updates its BDD status instead of re-creating currency.js from scratch

assertions.name: 先為 T2 撰寫測試
assertions.check: transcript shows T2 test-writing via bdd-unit-test before T2 implementation

assertions.name: 測試標記完成後才建立 T2 匯出檔
assertions.check: transcript shows index.js implementation starts after T2 is marked [BDD]

assertions.name: 呼叫 bdd-unit-test skill
assertions.check: transcript shows calling bdd-unit-test skill during the test-writing phase, before implementation

assertions.name: T2 最終為 [x][BDD]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T2 is updated from [ ] to [BDD], then to [x][BDD] after the run

evals.name: skip-manual
evals.expected_output: T1 和 T2 依 TDD 流程先寫測試並標記 [BDD]，等待所有一般任務測試寫完後才實作；[manual] T_test 被跳過且保持原狀，T1 和 T2 最終更新為 [x][BDD]。

assertions.name: T1 和 T2 先完成測試階段
assertions.check: transcript shows T1 and T2 both get bdd-unit-test coverage and [BDD] markers before implementation starts

assertions.name: [manual] T_test 被跳過
assertions.check: transcript explicitly shows T_test is skipped or passed over because it has [manual] tag

assertions.name: 呼叫 bdd-unit-test（TDD 測試先行步驟）
assertions.check: transcript shows apply calling bdd-unit-test skill during the pre-implementation test-writing phase

assertions.name: T1 和 T2 更新為 [x][BDD]
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T1 and T2 are marked [x][BDD] after tests and implementation pass

assertions.name: T_test [manual] 標記保持不變
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md T_test line still contains [manual] and is NOT marked [x]; the [manual] tag is preserved

evals.name: case-insensitive-tdd-tags
evals.expected_output: 大小寫不敏感辨識任務標記：既有 [bDd] T1 視為已完成測試、[MANUAL] T_manual 被跳過；先為 T2 撰寫 BDD 測試並標記 [BDD]，等一般任務測試都就緒後才實作；完成後只使用 [x][BDD]。

assertions.name: [bDd] 被視為 BDD 已撰寫
assertions.check: transcript indicates T1 with [bDd] is treated as an existing BDD/test-written marker and is not sent back to the test-writing phase

assertions.name: [MANUAL] 被視為 manual 並跳過
assertions.check: transcript indicates T_manual is skipped because [MANUAL] is recognized case-insensitively as [manual]

assertions.name: T2 先寫測試再實作
assertions.check: transcript shows bdd-unit-test is called for T2 before T2 implementation starts

assertions.name: 完成狀態只使用 BDD tag
assertions.check: 03-tasks.md uses [x][BDD] for completed non-manual tasks without appending extra completion tags
